/usr/bin/ar qc libfenix_core.a CMakeFiles/fenix_core.dir/src/binary_search.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fenix_core.dir/src/find_first_and_last.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fenix_core.dir/src/is_anagram.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fenix_core.dir/src/length_of_longest_substring.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fenix_core.dir/src/max_sum_given_fixed_length.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fenix_core.dir/src/packet_evaluation_stack.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fenix_core.dir/src/pending_list.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fenix_core.dir/src/prefix_sum.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fenix_core.dir/src/search_insert.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libfenix_core.a
